creator: denisy@devart.com
text:
My company Devart created Delphi Data Access components which support FreeBSD http://www.devart.com/unidac/ 

Thats why we are willing to be listed at your software vendors list http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/software.html

Short description of our products which support FreeBSD:

Devart (http://www.devart.com/dac.html) Delphi Data Access Components are feature-rich and high-performance libraries of components that provide native connectivity to Oracle, SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Interbase, Firebird from Delphi, C++Builder, Lazarus (and Free Pascal) under Windows, Mac OS X, iOS, Android, Linux, and FreeBSD for both 32-bit and 64-bit platforms. These Data Access Components aim to assist programmers in developing of fast and native desktop and mobile applications. It provides both possibility of connection to Oracle, SQL Server, MySQL, PostgeSQL, SQLite, Firebird and Interbase by means of native data access and directly via TCP/IP without involving Database Client.
